zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Netherton於1750年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州奧古斯塔時，她的父親Henry Netherton II40歲，母親Sarah Rhodes33歲。她於1776年2月13日與Henry Harding III在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1823年7月15日之前在美國肯塔基州謝佛遜，埋葬在美國肯塔基州奧爾德姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Netherton于1750年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州奧古斯塔时，她的父亲Henry Netherton II40岁，母亲Sarah Rhodes33岁。她于1776年2月13日与Henry Harding III在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1823年7月15日之前在美国肯塔基州謝佛遜，埋葬在美国肯塔基州奧爾德姆。

nameMeanings.name: Netherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from one or more of the many minor places called Netherton in Devon (the placename occurs in the parishes of Berry Pomeroy, Buckland Monachorum, Combe Martin, Farway, Haccombe, Hartland, Sherford, and Staverton), or from one or more of the other places in England called Netherton, found in Worcestershire, Northumberland, Lancashire, and Yorkshire. All of these placenames derive from Middle English nether ‘lower’ + toun ‘settlement’ (Old English neothera, tūn).

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

historicEvents.description: "Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
George Washington elected first president of United States.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 15th State
historicEvents.description: On June 1, 1792, Kentucky became the 15th state. It was the first state west of the Appalachian Mountains

historicEvents.title: Kentucky Bend Created
historicEvents.description: During the New Madrid earthquakes of 1811-1812, the Kentucky Bend or New Madrid Bend was created. It is located in the southwestern corner of Kentucky on the banks of the Mississippi River.
historicEvents.urlTitle: RootsRated-The Fascinating Story of Kentucky Bend: A Barely-Inhabited Isolated Piece of the State Cut-Off by a Curve in the Mississippi River

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Netherton was born in 1750, in Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Henry Netherton II, was 40 and her mother, Sarah Rhodes, was 33. She married Henry Harding III on 13 February 1776, in Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 15 July 1823, in Jefferson, Kentucky, United States, and was buried in Oldham, Kentucky, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Netherton est née en 1750, à Augusta, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Henry Netherton II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Sarah Rhodes, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Harding III le 13 février 1776, à Dunmore, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 15 juillet 1823, à Jefferson, Kentucky, États-Unis, et a été enterrée à Oldham, Kentucky, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rebecca Netherton 1750 in Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Netherton II 40 und ihre Mutter Sarah Rhodes 33. Sie hat am 13. Februar 1776 in Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America Henry Harding III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 15. Juli 1823 in Jefferson, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Oldham, Kentucky, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Netherton è nata il nel 1750 nel Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, Henry Netherton II, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Sarah Rhodes, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Henry Harding III il 13 febbraio 1776, nel Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 15 luglio 1823, nel Jefferson, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America, e fu sepolta a Oldham, Kentucky, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Nethertonが1750年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州アウグスタで生まれた時，父Henry Netherton IIは40歳，母Sarah Rhodesは33歳であった。1776年2月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ダンモーでHenry Harding IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1823年7月15日以前にアメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州ジェフエルソンで死去し，アメリカ合衆国ケンタッキー州オルドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어
ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Netherton(이)가 1750년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 오구스타에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Netherton II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Rhodes(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1776년 2월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어에서 Henry Harding III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1823년 7월 15일 이전 미국 켄터키 주 제퍼슨에서 사망했으며 미국 켄터키 주 드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Netherton nasceu em 1750, em Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Henry Netherton II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Rhodes, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Harding III em 13 de fevereiro de 1776, em Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 15 de julho de 1823, em Jefferson, Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América, e foi sepultada em Oldham, Kentucky, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Netherton родилась в 1750 г. в местности аугуста, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Henry Netherton II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Rhodes, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Harding III 13 февраля 1776 г. в местности дунмор, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 15 июля 1823 г. в местности джеффирсон, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты и была похоронена в местности олдхам, Кентукки, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Henry Harding III el 13 de febrero de 1776, en Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 15 de julio de 1823, en Jefferson, Kentucky, Estados Unidos, y fue sepultada en Oldham, Kentucky, Estados Unidos.
